name: Eagle Swing
about: Eagle Swing is a 24/7 private access indoor golf simulator facility located in Pocatello. The venue is designed for members to enjoy a privacy-focused golfing experience without staff watching, creating a home-like atmosphere. It utilizes Trackman 4 technology, the industry benchmark for golf simulation, and offers access to over 400 virtual golf courses. Memberships are currently required for access, with a waitlist in place due to a carefully balanced membership model to ensure ample playing time. The facility is geared toward serious golfers looking for affordable and convenient practice and play options.
why_golfers_like_it: Privacy-focused experience with no staff watching during play
Access to premium Trackman 4 technology for accurate shot tracking
Affordable pricing with average cost under $20 per hour
Automatic stat tracking to monitor progress

No mention of alcohol service; BYOB likely.
